headline: Kimberly-Clark: Pricing Attracts New Customer, But Hurts Margins (Downgrade)
summary: Kimberly-Clark's (KMB) organic sales growth but pricing headwinds persist. The macro environment improved somewhat with energy prices normalizing. See more.
